subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Even as thou didst write, the crows and ravens have seized possession of the rose garden [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان همانستکه مرقوم نمودی زاغ و زغن پیراهن گلشن گرفته
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @chastisement and requital, @poems and quotation from poetry
